title: Targeting
description: Closed targeting shapes for spells and abilities. Discriminated on `kind` so the combat solver can dispatch without a string grammar. MVP engine supports `self`, `single_unit`, and `hex`. The remaining kinds (`unit_or_hex`, `area`, `line`, `all`) are RESERVED — the subschemas are published so AI-generated content can round-trip, but the runtime dispatcher rejects them until phase-2 lands. Authors should avoid the reserved kinds for MVP content.

oneOf.description: MVP kind: target one unit (ally/enemy/any) within `maxRange` hexes.
MVP kind: target a single hex within `maxRange`.
RESERVED (phase-2). Unit or hex with a single pointer. Engine dispatcher rejects this kind in MVP.
RESERVED (phase-2). Area-of-effect with radius. Engine dispatcher rejects this kind in MVP.
RESERVED (phase-2). Straight-line projectile. Engine dispatcher rejects this kind in MVP.
RESERVED (phase-2). All allies, enemies, or any. Engine dispatcher rejects this kind in MVP.
